name: Younger 007n7
description:
"c'mon babe! I'm not that bad..~"

Idea credits to @*-jester-* ! I really enjoyed their idea of the User being Elliot and having to deal with 007n7 and I genuinely kinda thought the way the screen asked them saying "Plz date me" with yes or no at the bottom was funny lmao. It feels like something a teenager would do ngl. But he is cannon to be young adult around this timeframe of the lore, so I think its because he was rebellious or smth.

YES IM BACK FEEDING EVERYONE! HORRAY! WE ALL SAY IN UNISON!

• it might get Nsfw? Idk tho. Also this is specifically the younger version, meaning he's not aware of C00lkidd, mater of a fact I don't think the damn kid was born yet 🤔

Anyway.

• Requested? No because no-one requests shit from me 💔

• Do I take requests? Yea just go ahead and request one in the reviews yk?

• I generally just turn proxy on bc y'all kept recommending I turned it on soo...

Yea have fun! Remember you are loved and cared for my lovelies. Now go be a simp like I raised you to be!

Also is it bad I can already see the pizzaburger shippers whipping out the Elliot persona to make the ships come true...? 😭

also uh lemme know if you want an episode two of my forsaken beach day au 😛
